The Bare Earth Line

Bare Earth

Grounding, mineral-rich formulas for skin that feels like it just touched the earth.

What's inside

Four grounding ingredients, working the same way in every Bare Earth formula.

Willow Bark

Natural exfoliant — lifts away dullness and impurities without irritation.

Chamomile

Calms and soothes with every rinse, reducing redness and tightness.

Aloe Vera

Keeps skin hydrated and comfortable, even after cleansing.

Glycerin

Draws in moisture and holds it — the quiet workhorse behind every formula.

Willow Bark

A gentle natural exfoliant, drawn straight from the bark itself. It clears away dullness and impurities without irritation — even on the most sensitive skin.

Chamomile

Hand-picked for its calming touch. It soothes with every rinse, keeping skin balanced and never tight after cleansing.
